notes: pre-launch fear; works in dev, scared of real data; what if it breaks

messages.content: everything works on my machine now. all the features, all the tests pass
That's a solid place to be. The test suite covers the booking flow, cancellations, and the email notifications, and the staging build compiles cleanly.
If the features are complete and tested, launching to a small group first is a reasonable next step. I can help you set up a soft-launch flag so only invited users see it.
honestly I'm scared to put it live. it works with my 5 fake bookings but what if it breaks with real people and real data? I have no idea how to tell if it's actually ready
